title: Gemma 4 Released
summary: Gemma 4 is a new multimodal intelligence model. It enables on-device processing for various tasks.
body:
Hugging Face has announced the release of Gemma 4, a frontier multimodal intelligence model designed to operate on devices. This development allows for more efficient and private processing of multimodal data. 

 The release of Gemma 4 is significant as it pushes the boundaries of what is possible with on-device AI processing. By enabling multimodal intelligence on devices, Gemma 4 opens up new possibilities for applications that require both privacy and efficiency. 

 As Gemma 4 becomes available, developers and users alike can expect to see new and innovative applications of multimodal AI. With its focus on on-device processing, Gemma 4 is poised to make a significant impact in the field of AI research and development.
twitterThread: Introducing Gemma 4, the latest breakthrough in multimodal intelligence! This new model enables on-device processing, making AI more efficient and private than ever before.
What does this mean for you? With Gemma 4, you can expect faster and more secure processing of multimodal data, right on your device.
The implications are huge! Gemma 4 opens up new possibilities for applications that require both privacy and efficiency. Stay tuned for innovative new uses of multimodal AI!
Want to learn more about Gemma 4 and its potential applications? Read more at https://ainformed.dev
